entries.value: miongozo {value1} ya vitendo

entries.source: A {value1}-guide library built for learning that turns into action.
entries.value: Maktaba ya miongozo {value1} iliyojengwa kwa ajili ya kujifunza kunakogeuka kuwa hatua.

entries.source: A free public AI learning companion for tutoring, practice, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Msaidizi wa bure wa kujifunza kwa AI kwa umma kwa ufundishaji, mazoezi, maswali, kadi za kujifunzia, mdahalo, mrejesho wa uandishi, msaada wa msimbo, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: A practical AI learning path for moving from confusion to clear explanation, Socratic questions, examples, and active recall.
entries.value: Njia ya vitendo ya kujifunza kwa AI ya kutoka kwenye kuchanganyikiwa hadi maelezo yaliyo wazi, maswali ya Kisokratesi, mifano, na ukumbukaji amilifu.

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Mwongozo wa vitendo wa kutumia Jifunze Chochote kwenye inspir kwa kujifunza misingi, ukiwa na vidokezo vya kuanzishia, miduara ya masomo, na tabia salama zaidi za AI.

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: Mtazamo wa vitendo kuhusu jinsi AI inavyoweza kufanya kujifunza kuwe wazi zaidi, kuwa kwa mtu binafsi zaidi, na kufikika zaidi bila kuwafanya wanafunzi wakusanyaji wavivu wa majibu.

entries.source: A public learning site people can understand quickly.
entries.value: Tovuti ya kujifunza ya umma ambayo watu wanaweza kuelewa haraka.

entries.source: A short film introducing inspir's belief that learning should be free, accessible, and alive.
entries.value: Filamu fupi inayotambulisha imani ya inspir kwamba kujifunza kunapaswa kuwa bure, kufikika, na hai.

entries.source: A tutor for the first question
entries.value: Mwalimu kwa swali la kwanza

entries.value: ufikikaji, vidokezo vya kuanzishia, majaribio, tabia salama zaidi za AI, mitiririko ya wanafunzi, na uboreshaji wa UI.

entries.value: Baada ya kila dokezo, eleza kwa nini hatua hiyo inafanya kazi kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.value: Baada ya simulizi, fupisha mazingira, vikwazo, na ushahidi.

entries.value: Jibu swali la kujikagua, jaribu hatua, jadili dai, rekebisha rasimu, au tengeneza kadi za kukumbuka.
Je, maswali ni bora kuliko kusoma tena?
Hoja
Mazoezi ya hoja

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Uliza swali lolote na ujifunze kupitia maelezo wazi, mifano, vidokezo vya kufuatilia, na ufundishaji wa AI wenye subira.
Uliza chochote
Omba dokezo

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
entries.value: Omba dokezo, si jibu

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Omba maelezo rahisi zaidi ya dhana dhaifu zaidi.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Omba maswali matano yanayochanganya fasili, mifano, na matatizo ya kutumia maarifa.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Omba vidokezo, ukaguzi, mrejesho, na mipango ya masomo inayomwachia mwanafunzi kazi ya kufikiri.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Omba mada kwa lugha rahisi, kisha omba mlinganisho mmoja, mfano mmoja, na dhana moja potofu ya kawaida.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Niulize maswali matano ya Kisokratesi kuhusu mada hii. Baada ya kila jibu, niambie ni dhana gani niliyotumia na nini cha kupima baadaye.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Uliza maswali, changamoto mawazo, na ujifunze historia kupitia mazungumzo yenye msingi na watu mashuhuri wa zamani.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Iombe hali ya kihistoria iweke lebo kwa kilichothibitishwa, kilichodhaniwa, au kilichoigizwa.
Uliza swali halisi

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Uliza swali lako la kwanza na uingie moja kwa moja kwenye mazoezi.

entries.source: Available publicly while schools can run confidential custom versions.
entries.value: Inapatikana hadharani huku shule zikiweza kuendesha matoleo maalum ya siri.
Vinjari kila hali
Vinjari masomo

entries.source: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Jenga pasipoti ya wakati, pitisha tahadhari ya kusafiri, na uchunguze ulimwengu wa kihistoria kupitia tukio, ramani, mstari wa wakati, watu, sheria, orodha ya vitu, na ushahidi.

entries.source: Build an AI exam prep workflow with a realistic study plan, retrieval practice, quizzes, flashcards, and weak-area review.
entries.value: Jenga mtiririko wa maandalizi ya mtihani kwa AI wenye mpango halisi wa masomo, mazoezi ya kukumbuka, maswali, kadi za kujifunzia, na mapitio ya maeneo dhaifu.
Jenga mpango wa mtihani
Jenga mpango
Jenga nasi

entries.source: Built for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: Imejengwa kwa ajili ya udadisi, mazoezi, na ufikikaji.

entries.source: Built from real learner behavior, not a generic chat box.
entries.value: Imejengwa kutokana na tabia halisi za wanafunzi, si kisanduku cha gumzo cha kawaida.
Imejengwa ili itumike

entries.value: Je, msaada wa kazi za nyumbani kwa AI unaweza kuwa wa kimaadili?

entries.value: Je, ninaweza kunukuu mazungumzo ya kihistoria ya AI kama chanzo?

entries.value: Je, ninaweza kutumia inspir bila kuingia?

entries.value: Je, inspir inaweza kusaidia kazi za nyumbani bila kuchochea udanganyifu?
Kagua modeli yangu
Kagua hatua moja

entries.source: Check the reasoning line by line
entries.value: Kagua mantiki mstari kwa mstari

entries.source: Check this step in my working. If it is wrong, explain the mistake and give me one next move.
entries.value: Kagua hatua hii katika kazi yangu. Ikiwa si sahihi, eleza kosa na unipe hatua moja inayofuata.
Maelezo wazi
Mipaka wazi ya faragha
Mwalimu wa Msimbo
Uandishi wa msimbo
Mawasiliano
Linganisha hoja
Utekelezaji wa siri
Endelea

entries.source: Contributions are welcome from engineers, educators, designers, students, and anyone who wants AI learning to be safer, clearer, more accessible, and more useful.
entries.value: Michango inakaribishwa kutoka kwa wahandisi, waelimishaji, wabunifu, wanafunzi, na yeyote anayetaka kujifunza kwa AI kuwe salama zaidi, wazi zaidi, kufikika zaidi, na kufaa zaidi.
Geuza makosa

entries.source: Convert the explanation into active recall cards, then revisit the cards after mistakes or hesitation.
entries.value: Geuza maelezo kuwa kadi za ukumbukaji amilifu, kisha zipitie tena baada ya makosa au kusitasita.
Tengeneza jaribio dogo
Udadisi unaanzia hapa

entries.source: Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
entries.value: Udadisi, mazoezi, na AI inayofundisha.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wadadisi wanaotaka historia na mawazo yahisi kuwa katika muktadha, yanaweza kujadiliwa, na hai bila kupoteza ufuatiliaji wa ushahidi.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces with data confidentiality.
entries.value: Nafasi maalum za kujifunza kwa AI zenye usiri wa data.
Jadili dai
Jadili mada yoyote

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Jadili mada yoyote, changamshwa, linganisha madai, na ujifunze jinsi ya kujenga hoja imara zaidi.

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Mdahalo hukusaidia kutenganisha madai, ushahidi, maadili, na dhana, jambo linalofanya tafsiri ya kihistoria iwe sahihi zaidi.
Jadili dai

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Jadili dai kutoka pande zaidi ya moja ili uweze kuona dhana, mabadilishano, na ushahidi dhaifu.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Jadili dai hili la kihistoria au kifalsafa kutoka pande zote mbili. Tenganisha ushahidi, dhana, na maadili.
Imeundwa kwa ajili ya kujiamini

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Usikubali aya iliyorekebishwa mpaka uweze kueleza kwa nini marekebisho ni bora.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Usiombe muhtasari kamili kabla hujajua mawazo ya msingi yanayohitajika.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Usijadili upande unaokubaliana nao tayari pekee.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Usipuuze kusitasita; kutokuwa na uhakika ni ishara muhimu kwa mapitio.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Usiruhusu uigizaji kuchukua nafasi ya tarehe, muktadha, nyaraka, au lebo za ushahidi.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Usitengeneze mpango unaodhani kila mada inahitaji muda sawa.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Usitengeneze kadi za kujifunzia kutokana na sentensi ambazo bado huwezi kuzifafanua kwa maneno yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Usibandike zoezi na kuomba jibu lililokamilika.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Usisome tena noti kabla ya kupima kile unachoweza kukumbuka tayari.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Usiruke kuonyesha ulichojaribu tayari; msaada unaofaa unategemea muktadha huo.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Usiishie baada ya maelezo ya kwanza; jilazimishe kujibu maswali kuyahusu.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Usichukulie mazungumzo yaliyotengenezwa kuwa nukuu halisi au chanzo cha msingi.
Fanya kitu nacho
Je, inspir inasaidia shule?

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Kila mwongozo unaishia na mipango ya mazoezi, njia, na viungo kwenda kwenye hali halisi ya kujifunza inayofaa.

entries.source: Each guide points to a mode, prompt, or review loop so reading can become practice.
entries.value: Kila mwongozo unaelekeza kwenye hali, kidokezo cha kuanzishia, au mzunguko wa mapitio ili kusoma kugeuke kuwa mazoezi.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Kila hali hufunguka kama gumzo la mgeni la umma lenye kusudi lake, mifano, na mtiririko wa kujifunza, ili wanafunzi waanze mara moja na aina sahihi ya msaada.
Hatua rahisi zinazofuata
Weka kipindi cha wakati
Ingiza muktadha

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.
entries.value: Kila makala inaunganishwa na kategoria, hali hai, vituo vya masomo, njia za kujifunza, na miongozo inayohusiana.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: Kila ukurasa usio wa programu sasa una kazi: kujenga imani, kueleza njia ya kujifunza, na kuwaelekeza wanafunzi kwenye hatua inayofuata yenye manufaa bila kuficha maelezo muhimu.
Matukio yanayozingatia ushahidi
Maandalizi ya mtihani
Mpangaji wa Maandalizi ya Mtihani

Eleza hatua inayofuata

entries.source: Explain this topic in plain language. Name the three prerequisite ideas I need, one analogy, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Eleza mada hii kwa lugha rahisi. Taja mawazo matatu ya awali ninayohitaji, mlinganisho mmoja, na dhana moja potofu ya kawaida.

entries.source: Explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, writing, code, debate, and study planning.
entries.value: Maelezo, ufundishaji wa Kisokratesi, ukufunzi wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali, kadi za kujifunzia, uandishi, msimbo, mdahalo, na kupanga masomo.

entries.value: Chunguza Historia na Mawazo Makubwa kwa AI
Chunguza historia na mawazo

entries.source: Explore history, public figures, causes, debates, philosophy, and source critique with AI learning modes that separate evidence from simulation.
entries.value: Chunguza historia, watu mashuhuri wa umma, visababishi, midahalo, falsafa, na uhakiki wa vyanzo kwa hali za kujifunza za AI zinazotenganisha ushahidi na simulizi.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Kadi za kujifunzia hufanya kazi vyema zaidi zinapopima wazo moja kwa wakati mmoja, zinaonyesha majibu baada tu ya juhudi, na kurudia kadi zilizokosewa mapema zaidi.

entries.source: For math or logic, work one step at a time and ask why each move is allowed before moving on.
entries.value: Kwa hisabati au mantiki, fanya hatua moja kwa wakati na uliza kwa nini kila hatua inaruhusiwa kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.value: Tengeneza jaribio la chaguo-nyingi lililolenga somo lolote na pitia maelezo baada ya kila jibu.

entries.source: Get a study schedule, quiz yourself on weak areas, and turn misses into flashcards for repeated review.
entries.value: Pata ratiba ya masomo, jipime kwenye maeneo dhaifu, na geuza makosa kuwa kadi za kujifunzia kwa mapitio ya kurudia.

entries.value: Ondoka kwenye kukwama kwa kazi za nyumbani kwa vidokezo vya kimaadili, mifano, ukaguzi, na ukufunzi wa hatua kwa hatua.

entries.source: Give feedback on structure, clarity, and evidence. Keep my voice and do not rewrite the whole answer.
entries.value: Toa mrejesho kuhusu muundo, uwazi, na ushahidi. Hifadhi sauti yangu na usiandike upya jibu lote.

entries.value: Miongozo, njia, masomo, na vidokezo vya kuanzishia vinaunganisha na sehemu inayofuata yenye manufaa ya kufanya mazoezi.
Ramani ya kujifunza yenye msaada

entries.source: Here is the question and what I tried. Give me the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Hili ndilo swali na nilichojaribu. Nipe dokezo dogo zaidi lenye manufaa, si jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Boresha uandishi kwa upangaji, marekebisho, muundo, na mrejesho unaohifadhi sauti yako.

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: Jumuisha swali, ulichojaribu tayari, mahali ulipokwama, na kama unataka dokezo, ukaguzi wa hatua, au mrejesho.
maktaba ya miongozo ya kujifunza ya inspir

entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.
entries.value: inspir ilianza kama maswali na jumuiya za wanafunzi, ikakua kupitia shule na matukio, na sasa inatumia AI kufanya kujifunza kwa mtu mmoja mmoja kufikika zaidi.

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: inspir ipo kwa ajili ya wakati mwanafunzi anapotaka kuelewa jambo na anahitaji mahali penye subira pa kuanzia. Filamu inaitambulisha bidhaa kama msaidizi wa umma wa kujifunza bila malipo kwa ajili ya udadisi, mazoezi, na ufikikaji.
inspir ikiwa katika mwendo

entries.source: inspir is being built in public.
entries.value: inspir inajengwa hadharani.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes with specific teaching shapes: hints, Socratic questions, quizzes, active recall, role-play, debate, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka hali za kujifunza zenye maumbo maalum ya ufundishaji: vidokezo, maswali ya Kisokratesi, maswali ya mazoezi, ukumbukaji amilifu, uigizaji, mdahalo, mrejesho wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.
filamu ya kujifunza ya inspir

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: inspir hugeuza udadisi, kazi za nyumbani, marudio, na maswali makubwa kuwa vipindi vya kujifunza vinavyoongozwa na AI vinavyoeleza, kuuliza tena, na kukusaidia kufanya mazoezi.
inspir: Unaweza Kujifunza Chochote
Je, inspir ni bure kutumia?
Endeleza njia

entries.source: Know what to try next, why a step works, where the mistake happened, and how to revise the final answer in your own voice.
entries.value: Jua nini cha kujaribu baadaye, kwa nini hatua inafanya kazi, kosa lilitokea wapi, na jinsi ya kurekebisha jibu la mwisho kwa sauti yako mwenyewe.
Jifunze Chochote

entries.source: Learn Anything prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo vya Jifunze Chochote na mzunguko wa masomo

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Jifunze Chochote kwa kutumia Mwalimu wa AI wa bure: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Learn by talking, testing, debating, and exploring.
entries.value: Jifunze kwa kuzungumza, kujipima, kujadili, na kuchunguza.

entries.source: Learn programming, debug concepts, plan projects, interpret data, and research technical questions with public AI modes that keep the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Jifunze programu, tatua dhana, panga miradi, fasiri data, na tafiti maswali ya kiufundi kwa hali za umma za AI zinazomweka mwanafunzi ndani ya mchakato.

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Jifunze kupitia maswali yaliyolenga, vidokezo, na tafakari badala ya kusoma majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: Learn with a free AI tutor for explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Jifunze na mwalimu wa AI bila malipo kwa maelezo, maswali ya Kisokratesi, ukufunzi wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali, kadi za kujifunzia, mdahalo, mrejesho wa uandishi, msaada wa msimbo, na kupanga masomo.
Msaada unaomtanguliza mwanafunzi

entries.source: Learners need a sequence, not a pile of links. These paths connect modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanahitaji mlolongo, si rundo la viungo. Njia hizi huunganisha hali kuwa miduara ya vitendo ya masomo kwa kuelewa, kazi za nyumbani, maandalizi ya mtihani, na uchunguzi.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaohisi wamekwama mwanzoni mwa somo jipya au wanaohitaji njia rahisi zaidi kuingia kwenye wazo gumu.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Wanafunzi walio na muda mdogo, mtaala mkubwa, na wanaohitaji njia halisi ya kurudia bila kujifanya kila kitu kina umuhimu sawa.
Kujifunza kwa kila mtu
miongozo ya kujifunza na miduara ya mazoezi

entries.source: Leave with a plain-language model, sharper questions, examples you can explain back, and recall cards for review.
entries.value: Ondoka ukiwa na modeli ya lugha rahisi, maswali makali zaidi, mifano unayoweza kueleza kwa maneno yako, na kadi za kukumbuka kwa mapitio.

entries.source: Let me interview this historical person. Keep answers evidence-aware and mark uncertainty clearly.
entries.value: Niache nimhoji mtu huyu wa kihistoria. Weka majibu yakizingatia ushahidi na onyesha kutokuwa na uhakika waziwazi.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors and revisit them after a delay.
entries.value: Tengeneza kadi za kujifunzia kutokana na makosa na zipitie tena baada ya muda.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors, hesitation, formulas, definitions, and concepts you could not explain clearly.
entries.value: Tengeneza kadi za kujifunzia kutokana na makosa, kusitasita, fomula, fasili, na dhana ambazo hukuweza kueleza kwa uwazi.
Fanya ikae akilini
Fanya wazo likae akilini
Fanya mpango wa masomo uwe halisi
Hisabati
Mkufunzi wa Hatua za Hisabati

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need different help. Start from the subject, then move into the mode, prompt, guide, or review loop that fits.
entries.value: Hisabati, uandishi, msimbo, historia, kazi za nyumbani, na maandalizi ya mtihani kila moja huhitaji msaada tofauti. Anza na somo, kisha nenda kwenye hali, kidokezo cha kuanzishia, mwongozo, au mzunguko wa mapitio unaofaa.
Dhamira kwanza

entries.source: Mode guides, prompt loops, study methods, and cornerstone articles for common learning moments.
entries.value: Miongozo ya hali, miduara ya vidokezo, mbinu za kusoma, na makala za msingi kwa nyakati za kawaida za kujifunza.

entries.source: Move from a plain-language explanation into questions, examples, and memory practice.
entries.value: Hama kutoka maelezo ya lugha rahisi kwenda kwenye maswali, mifano, na mazoezi ya kumbukumbu.

entries.source: Move into Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, and guided instruction.
entries.value: Ingia kwenye maswali ya Kisokratesi, maswali ya mazoezi, kadi za kujifunzia, mdahalo, uigizaji, na mafundisho yanayoongozwa.
Nyamazisha filamu

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: Mtihani wangu uko tarehe hii. Huu hapa mtaala, maeneo yangu dhaifu, na muda nilio nao. Tengeneza mpango halisi wenye ukumbukaji wa kila siku.
Chaguo zinazolingana na NCERT
Hatua inayofuata

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Hapana. Chukulia mazungumzo yaliyotengenezwa kama simulizi ya kujifunza. Nukuu vyanzo halisi vya msingi au vya upili kwa madai ya ukweli.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Si kisanduku kingine cha majibu. Ni mahali pa kujifunza.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Fungua hali na uanze mara moja, bila akaunti kuhitajika kwa uzoefu wa umma wa mgeni.
Wazi kwa muundo
Fungua filamu kwenye skrini nzima
Fungua gumzo la mgeni
Fungua kituo cha somo

entries.source: Open the exact kind of help you came for.
entries.value: Fungua aina halisi ya msaada uliokuja kutafuta.
Fungua ramani ya kujifunza
Fungua njia

entries.source: Pages are designed to move people from explanation into a live mode, prompt, quiz, or review loop.
entries.value: Kurasa zimeundwa kuwahamisha watu kutoka maelezo kwenda kwenye hali hai, kidokezo cha kuanzishia, jaribio, au mzunguko wa mapitio.

entries.source: Paste the question and what you have tried, then ask for the smallest useful next step.
entries.value: Bandika swali na ulichojaribu, kisha omba hatua ndogo zaidi inayofuata yenye manufaa.
Sitisha filamu

entries.source: Place me in this time and location. Label documented facts separately from plausible simulation and ask what I notice.
entries.value: Niweke katika wakati na eneo hili. Weka lebo tofauti kwa ukweli uliothibitishwa na simulizi inayowezekana, kisha uliza ninachokiona.
Maelezo kwa lugha rahisi

entries.source: Plan exam revision, generate quizzes, build flashcards, schedule spaced review, and keep motivation realistic with focused AI learning modes.
entries.value: Panga marudio ya mtihani, tengeneza maswali, jenga kadi za kujifunzia, ratibu mapitio yaliyopangwa kwa vipindi, na weka motisha kuwa halisi kwa hali za kujifunza za AI zilizo makini.

entries.source: Plan the work, practise retrieval, and close weak spots with quizzes and active recall.
entries.value: Panga kazi, fanya mazoezi ya kukumbuka, na ziba mapengo dhaifu kwa maswali na ukumbukaji amilifu.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Learn Anything on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo vya kuanzishia na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa kwa kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Jifunze Chochote kwenye inspir.
Muulize mhusika
Hoji mtazamo wa kihistoria

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Maswali hukulazimisha kufichua modeli yako ya mada, ndipo kuchanganyikiwa, kujiamini kwa uongo, na mawazo ya msingi yanayokosekana huonekana mara nyingi.
Majibu ya haraka

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Nipime kwenye mada hizi swali moja kwa wakati. Baada ya kila jibu, eleza pengo na ongeza ugumu taratibu.
Nipime kwenye Trivia
Pima maeneo dhaifu
Jipime

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Jipime kwanza ili uone unachokumbuka kweli na mahali kujiamini kunapopotosha.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Maswali mara nyingi hufichua zaidi kwa sababu hupima kukumbuka. Kusoma tena kunaweza kusaidia baada ya jaribio kuonyesha kinachohitaji kurekebishwa.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kutoa uzoefu wa gumzo la AI wenye chapa yao uliotengenezwa kwa wanafunzi wao, ikiwemo maudhui na mitiririko inayolingana na NCERT, huku matumizi yakifadhiliwa na shule washirika au udhamini wa CSR.

entries.source: Search pages, blog guides, prompts, and live modes are linked around a simple loop: ask, try, check, repair, and review.
entries.value: Kurasa za utafutaji, miongozo ya blogu, vidokezo vya kuanzishia, na hali hai zimeunganishwa kuzunguka mzunguko rahisi: uliza, jaribu, kagua, rekebisha, na pitia tena.
Tenganisha ukweli na ubunifu

Ukaguzi wa Kisokratesi
Mafundisho ya Kisokratesi
Mwalimu wa Kisokratesi

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Ufundishaji wa Kisokratesi hutumia maswali, dhana za kujaribu, vidokezo, na tafakari kujenga uelewa wa kina zaidi kuliko kusoma majibu bila kushiriki.
Anza kipindi hai cha kujifunza.

entries.source: Start as soon as you know the exam date. If time is short, prioritize weak areas, past-paper style questions, and daily recall.
entries.value: Anza mara tu unapojua tarehe ya mtihani. Ikiwa muda ni mfupi, tanguliza maeneo dhaifu, maswali ya mtindo wa mitihani iliyopita, na ukumbukaji wa kila siku.

entries.source: Start by asking for a simple explanation, one everyday analogy, and the three ideas you need before the topic will make sense.
entries.value: Anza kwa kuomba maelezo rahisi, mlinganisho mmoja wa kila siku, na mawazo matatu unayohitaji kabla mada haijaanza kueleweka.

entries.source: Start each session with a quick quiz before rereading.
entries.value: Anza kila kipindi kwa jaribio la haraka kabla ya kusoma tena.
Anza na kanuni za msingi

entries.source: Start from the subject, then open the right learning mode.
entries.value: Anza na somo, kisha ufungue hali sahihi ya kujifunza.

entries.source: Start from the thing you do not understand and get a plain-language model, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Anza na kitu usichokielewa na upate modeli ya lugha rahisi, mifano, na hatua zinazofuata.
Anza kujifunza

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Anza na mada, zoezi, rasimu, mtihani, au wazo katika hali inayofaa kazi hiyo.
Anza na Jifunze Chochote

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Anza na mahali, wakati, utambulisho, vikwazo, na lebo za ushahidi ili tukio lisiwe uigizaji wa jumla.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Anza na kazi unayohitaji kufanywa.

Ukaguzi wa hatua

entries.source: Step into historical context, compare arguments, and practise seeing an idea from more than one side.
entries.value: Ingia katika muktadha wa kihistoria, linganisha hoja, na fanya mazoezi ya kuona wazo kutoka upande zaidi ya mmoja.

entries.source: Students who need a next step, a mistake check, or feedback without losing ownership of the assignment.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaohitaji hatua inayofuata, ukaguzi wa kosa, au mrejesho bila kupoteza umiliki wa zoezi.

entries.source: Study loops, AI tutoring guides, and practical prompts.
entries.value: Miduara ya masomo, miongozo ya ufundishaji wa AI, na vidokezo vya vitendo.

entries.source: subject hubs mapped to learner needs
entries.value: vituo vya masomo vilivyopangwa kulingana na mahitaji ya wanafunzi
Fupisha muktadha

entries.source: Supports extracurricular learning, academic practice, and curiosity.
entries.value: Husaidia kujifunza nje ya darasa, mazoezi ya kitaaluma, na udadisi.

entries.source: Switch into questions so you can reveal assumptions and fill gaps instead of passively reading the answer.
entries.value: Badili kwenda kwenye maswali ili uweze kufichua dhana na kujaza mapengo badala ya kusoma jibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: Talk to a historical figure while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented quotation.
entries.value: Zungumza na mhusika wa kihistoria huku ukitenganisha mazungumzo yaliyotengenezwa na nukuu iliyothibitishwa.

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: Blogu huunganisha ushauri wa kujifunza wenye manufaa na mazoezi hai, ili mwongozo ugeuke kuwa kipindi cha masomo kwa hatua moja.

entries.source: The blog is organized around real study moments: getting unstuck, remembering more, writing better, preparing for exams, and exploring ideas with a patient tutor.
entries.value: Blogu imepangwa kuzunguka nyakati halisi za kusoma: kutoka kwenye kukwama, kukumbuka zaidi, kuandika vizuri zaidi, kujiandaa kwa mitihani, na kuchunguza mawazo na mwalimu mwenye subira.
Jukwaa pana la inspir la chanzo huria.

entries.source: The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: Sehemu ya mwisho inarudi kwenye dhamira: ufikiaji wa umma, shule, na njia iliyo wazi zaidi ya kujifunza.
Ujenzi upya wa sasa wa inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: Filamu huhama kutoka msukumo hadi ahadi ya vitendo: msaidizi wa kujifunza wa AI mwenye subira.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: Hali za kazi za nyumbani na Kisokratesi zimeundwa kuzunguka vidokezo, mantiki, ukaguzi wa hatua, na maelezo ya mwanafunzi badala ya kutoa tu majibu yaliyokamilika.

entries.source: The middle section frames inspir around understanding, hints, quizzes, and active learning loops.
entries.value: Sehemu ya kati inaweka inspir kuzunguka uelewa, vidokezo, maswali, na miduara ya kujifunza amilifu.
Jukwaa la kizazi kijacho la masomo kwa AI.

entries.source: The opening frames set up learning as something anyone should be able to start immediately.
entries.value: Fremu za mwanzo zinaonyesha kujifunza kama kitu ambacho yeyote anapaswa kuweza kuanza mara moja.

entries.source: The public site is structured like a learning map: live modes for immediate help, subject hubs for learner questions, and guides that turn reading into action.
entries.value: Tovuti ya umma imeundwa kama ramani ya kujifunza: hali hai kwa msaada wa mara moja, vituo vya masomo kwa maswali ya wanafunzi, na miongozo inayogeuza kusoma kuwa hatua.

entries.source: The site is a route, not a brochure.
entries.value: Tovuti ni njia, si brosha.
Fikiri kwa kina zaidi
Safari ya wakati
Vikundi vya mada
Nakala

entries.source: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Geuza noti au mada kuwa kadi za kujifunzia zilizo makini zenye vidokezo, majibu, mifano, na mitego ya kawaida.

entries.source: Turn the corrected mistake into a flashcard or short checklist for later.
entries.value: Geuza kosa lililosahihishwa kuwa kadi ya kujifunzia au orodha fupi ya ukaguzi kwa baadaye.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into active recall cards with one conceptual card, one example card, and one misconception card.
entries.value: Geuza maelezo kuwa kadi za ukumbukaji amilifu zenye kadi moja ya dhana, kadi moja ya mfano, na kadi moja ya dhana potofu.

entries.source: Turn the hardest missed question into a flashcard and review it later.
entries.value: Geuza swali gumu zaidi ulilokosea kuwa kadi ya kujifunzia na lipitie tena baadaye.

entries.source: Turn these missed questions into flashcards grouped by concept, formula, definition, and example.
entries.value: Geuza maswali haya uliyokosea kuwa kadi za kujifunzia zilizopangwa kwa dhana, fomula, fasili, na mfano.

entries.source: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Geuza mtaala wako, tarehe ya mtihani, muda, na maeneo dhaifu kuwa mpango wa vitendo wa masomo.
Elewa mada ngumu

entries.source: Understand a historical context, question a perspective, compare claims, and separate simulation from documented fact.
entries.value: Elewa muktadha wa kihistoria, hoji mtazamo, linganisha madai, na tenganisha simulizi na ukweli uliothibitishwa.

entries.source: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Elewa msimbo, tatua makosa, jifunze dhana za programu, na jenga miradi midogo hatua kwa hatua.
Ondoa unyamazishaji wa filamu

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Tumia AI kama mkufunzi wa kuelewa, kufanya mazoezi, na kupata mrejesho badala ya njia ya mkato inayofuta kujifunza kimyakimya.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Tumia ukufunzi wa kazi za nyumbani wa AI kwa vidokezo, ukaguzi wa hatua, mantiki ya hisabati, na mrejesho wa uandishi huku kazi ya mwisho ikibaki yako.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Tumia safari ya wakati ya AI, mazungumzo ya kihistoria, na mazoezi ya mdahalo kuchunguza muktadha, ushahidi, hoja, na mitazamo.
use client

entries.source: Use debate to compare the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: Tumia mdahalo kulinganisha dai imara zaidi na pingamizi imara zaidi.

entries.source: Use hints, step checks, and writing feedback without turning the learning into answer copying.
entries.value: Tumia vidokezo, ukaguzi wa hatua, na mrejesho wa uandishi bila kugeuza kujifunza kuwa kunakili majibu.

entries.source: Use inspir for essay feedback, reading support, speaking practice, source critique, and revision loops that improve structure without replacing the learner's voice.
entries.value: Tumia inspir kwa mrejesho wa insha, msaada wa kusoma, mazoezi ya kuzungumza, uhakiki wa vyanzo, na miduara ya marekebisho inayoboresha muundo bila kuchukua nafasi ya sauti ya mwanafunzi.

entries.source: Use inspir for homework hints, math step checks, writing feedback, source critique, Socratic questions, and flashcards without exposing private chats.
entries.value: Tumia inspir kwa vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, ukaguzi wa hatua za hisabati, mrejesho wa uandishi, uhakiki wa vyanzo, maswali ya Kisokratesi, na kadi za kujifunzia bila kufichua mazungumzo ya faragha.

entries.source: Use inspir for step-by-step math help, homework hints, Socratic reasoning, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep without answer-copying.
entries.value: Tumia inspir kwa msaada wa hisabati hatua kwa hatua, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, fikra za Kisokratesi, maswali, kadi za kujifunzia, na maandalizi ya mtihani bila kunakili majibu.

entries.source: Use public guest modes for free, then explore the open-source work and school deployment paths.
entries.value: Tumia hali za umma za mgeni bila malipo, kisha chunguza kazi ya chanzo huria na njia za utekelezaji shuleni.
Tumia maswali ya Kisokratesi

entries.source: Use the exam date, syllabus, available time, and weak areas to create a plan that can survive real life.
entries.value: Tumia tarehe ya mtihani, mtaala, muda uliopo, na maeneo dhaifu kuunda mpango unaoweza kustahimili maisha halisi.

entries.source: Use the linked guide, prompt, subject hub, or learning path to review the weak spot later.
entries.value: Tumia mwongozo uliounganishwa, kidokezo cha kuanzishia, kituo cha somo, au njia ya kujifunza kupitia eneo dhaifu baadaye.

entries.source: Use writing feedback for structure, clarity, and evidence while keeping the final draft recognizably yours.
entries.value: Tumia mrejesho wa uandishi kwa muundo, uwazi, na ushahidi huku rasimu ya mwisho ikibaki kutambulika kuwa yako.

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Kile ambacho msaidizi wa kujifunza wa AI anapaswa kumfanyia kila mtu

entries.source: What learners usually ask before they start.
entries.value: Maswali ambayo wanafunzi huuliza kwa kawaida kabla hawajaanza.

entries.source: What should I ask first when a topic feels too hard?
entries.value: Niulize nini kwanza wakati mada inahisi kuwa ngumu sana?

entries.source: What should I include in a homework prompt?
entries.value: Niweke nini kwenye kidokezo cha kazi za nyumbani?
Unachoweza kufanya
AI ya shule yenye chapa maalum

entries.source: Why a Socratic AI tutor can make ideas stick
entries.value: Kwa nini mwalimu wa AI wa Kisokratesi anaweza kufanya mawazo yadumu
Kwa nini kuchanganya historia na mdahalo?

entries.source: Why use Socratic questions after an explanation?
entries.value: Kwa nini utumie maswali ya Kisokratesi baada ya maelezo?

entries.source: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Fanya kazi kupitia aljebra, kalkulasi, matatizo ya maneno, na dhana za hisabati hatua moja kwa wakati na mkufunzi wa AI.
Fanya kazi kupitia hatua za hisabati

entries.source: Write a three-sentence explanation without looking, then ask the Socratic mode to find the weak link.
entries.value: Andika maelezo ya sentensi tatu bila kuangalia, kisha iombe hali ya Kisokratesi ipate kiungo dhaifu.

entries.source: Write exactly where you got stuck before asking for help.
entries.value: Andika hasa mahali ulipokwama kabla ya kuomba msaada.
Uandishi
Mkufunzi wa Uandishi

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Ndiyo, inapotoa vidokezo, kukagua mantiki, kueleza makosa, na kukuomba utoe jibu la mwisho badala ya kukuandikia.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Mazungumzo ya umma ya mada kama Jifunze Chochote, Mafundisho ya Kisokratesi, Mkufunzi wa Kazi za Nyumbani, maswali, na kadi za kujifunzia hufunguka moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni.

entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Shule zinaweza kutumia bidhaa ya umma kwanza, kisha kujadili nafasi maalum za kujifunza kwa AI zenye mitiririko maalum ya shule, usiri, na chaguo za ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za kujifunza kama mgeni zimeundwa kwa ufikiaji wa bure, ili wanafunzi waanze bila kuhitaji utekelezaji wa shule au akaunti ya kulipia.

entries.source: You can try public learning modes freely. Saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data stay private.
entries.value: Unaweza kujaribu hali za umma za kujifunza kwa uhuru. Mazungumzo yaliyohifadhiwa, akaunti, zana za usimamizi, na data ya watumiaji hubaki faragha.
